## Summary

What this PR does, in one or two sentences.

## Motivation

What problem is being solved, or what capability is being added. Link the
issue this PR addresses (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Changes

- Bullet list of the main changes
- Keep each item concise

## Testing

How you verified the change works. If it's a JS-only change, what tests cover
it. If native code or the C++ core changed, what platforms you exercised
manually and which test suites you ran.

- [ ] `yarn lint` passes
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes
- [ ] `yarn test` passes (JS unit tests)
- [ ] C++ test suite passes (`cd cpp/build && ctest`)
- [ ] Verified on iOS (simulator / device — specify which)
- [ ] Verified on Android (emulator / device — specify which)

## Breaking changes

If this introduces a breaking change, describe the impact and the migration
path. Link to the relevant CHANGELOG entry.

## Anything else?

Screenshots for UI changes, before/after benchmarks for perf changes, notes
for the reviewer, etc.
